description: Multi-phase plans currently in flight. Each phase references roadmap item titles; the activePhase section breaks the current phase into concrete tasks with status. Survives conversation compactions — a fresh session can pick up by reading this file.

phases.title: Plugin runtime — manifest, SDK, federation hooks
roadmapItems: Plugin runtime — manifest format, loader, SDK, federation hooks
phases.notes: Shipped. PluginManifest / definePlugin / server + client loaders / auto-mounted federation routes / hello-world reference plugin.

phases.title: Polls & Quizzes plugin — first SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Polls & Quizzes — first plugin (validates simple SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped end-to-end: schema migrations, REST routes, federation handler, real-time sync via babelr:ws custom event, translation wired manually (to be automated in Phase 3), list-detail view via the new ListDetailView primitive, sidebar-slot button opens the view.

phases.title: SDK gap-closure based on polls implementation
roadmapItems: Translation as default for plugin content — zero-config primitive
phases.notes: All four in-scope tasks shipped: component ergonomics (ComponentType + createElement), translation-by-default (<T>), WS helper (onWsMessage), and documented the server-safe/client-only file-split convention. Plugin authors now have one-liners for the friction points polls exposed. Phase 4 (project management) starts on a smoother SDK. Deferred items persisted to roadmap: 'Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities' (P2, ships with Phase 5), 'Plugin DB abstraction — helper over drizzle for plugin tables' (P3, revisit after PM), 'Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests' (P2, builds alongside PM), and cross-Tower voting is already covered by 'Validate polls federation across two-Tower staging' (P2).

phases.title: Project management plugin — complex SDK consumer
roadmapItems: Project management — second plugin (validates complex SDK case)
phases.notes: Shipped. 9 tasks: schema + CRUD, board list + kanban view, work item CRUD + sidebar preview, DnD reordering, comment threads (useChat), task + board embeds, real-time WS sync, AS2 federation (plugin inbox dispatch hook + outbound delivery + inbound handling), polish pass. SDK additions: <E> component, PluginInboxHandler, fastify.deliverToGroupFollowers. Roadmap item added for e2e federation testing on live Towers.

phases.title: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install, manifest freeze
roadmapItems: Plugin distribution — npm packaging, admin install flow, manifest freeze
Plugin SDK — stable re-exports of @babelr/client utilities
Plugin test harness — standard pattern for plugin unit + integration tests
phases.notes: Polls + PM prove the contract works end-to-end. Phase 5 freezes the manifest, ships npm packaging so third-party authors can build/distribute plugins, and batches the SDK re-export + test harness deferred items. Circle back after MVP gaps are closed.

phases.title: Market-MVP gaps — onboarding, PWA, email verification, 2FA
roadmapItems: First-run onboarding flow — guided server creation + language preference
PWA support — installable web app + offline shell as a quick mobile path
phases.notes: Done. All four shipped: onboarding wizard (5-step), PWA (vite-plugin-pwa), email verification (nodemailer + SMTP), 2FA (TOTP + recovery codes).

phases.title: UX refinement — migrate overlays to views, build component primitives
roadmapItems: UX: migrate modal overlays to view registry for mobile-ready layout
UX: component primitives palette (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel)
phases.notes: Done. All 8 tasks shipped: 3 primitives (TabbedView, ScrollListView, SidePanel), 6 view migrations, auto-toolbar, responsive breakpoints, SDK primitive exports, 7 Playwright e2e tests.

phases.title: Complexity refactor — split god files, extract shared patterns
roadmapItems: Complexity refactor — split god files, extract shared patterns
phases.notes: Done. All 6 tasks shipped: serializers extracted, channels.ts split (1771→488), handleCreate dispatch table, useVoice split (1006→537), PM client split (1212→307), requireAuth + replyError helpers. 18 pre-refactor tests added (274 total).

phases.title: Launch gaps — features users expect from a chat app
roadmapItems: Web push notifications — VAPID, service worker push, desktop Notification API
User profile cards — view other users' profiles on click
phases.notes: The 'feels incomplete' cluster. Push notifications is the biggest — users literally miss messages without it. Link previews make every pasted URL look broken. Pinned messages, bans, and profile cards are table-stakes expectations. After these five, the P2 items (code highlighting, advanced search, DND, message jump, accessibility) are the next priority.

activePhase.title: Launch gaps — features users expect from a chat app
activePhase.goal: Close the gaps that make Babelr feel incomplete compared to Discord/Slack. Five P1 features that address the biggest user-facing pain points. Each is independently shippable.
activePhase.sequencing: Push notifications first (biggest user impact — messages are literally missed without it). Link previews second (every URL looks broken). Pinned messages third (quick win, simple schema + UI). User bans fourth (security table-stakes). Profile cards last (polish, not blocking).

tasks.title: Web push notifications
tasks.resolution: Server: push_subscriptions table, VAPID config from env (VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY/PRIVATE_KEY), web-push npm package. Routes: GET /push/vapid-key, POST /push/subscribe (upsert by endpoint), DELETE /push/unsubscribe. broadcastPushToChannel() fires on every new message via createMessageInChannel — respects per-channel mute. Expired subscriptions (404/410) auto-cleaned. Client: custom SW (injectManifest mode) with push event handler showing notifications + notificationclick focusing/opening the app. subscribeToPush() called on ChatView mount — requests permission, gets VAPID key, subscribes via PushManager, registers with server. push.ts module handles the subscription flow. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details: Server: VAPID key pair generation + storage. New user_push_subscriptions table (actorId, endpoint, p256dh, auth, createdAt). POST /push/subscribe + DELETE /push/unsubscribe routes. On new message/DM/mention: fan out web-push notifications to subscribed devices via the web-push npm package. Respect per-channel mute from notification_preferences. Client: request Notification permission after onboarding. Register push subscription with the service worker. SW push event handler shows notification with message preview + sender. Click navigates to the channel. Desktop: Notification API for foreground-but-unfocused tab. Badge API for unread count on the PWA icon.

tasks.title: Link preview / URL unfurling
tasks.resolution: Server: unfurl.ts extracts URLs from message content, fetches og:meta (title, description, image, site_name) with 5s timeout + 256KB body limit, caches by URL for 24h, max 3 URLs per message. Runs asynchronously after message creation — doesn't block the response. Previews stored as message.properties.linkPreviews and broadcast via message:updated WS event. Client: LinkPreviewCards component renders compact cards with image thumbnail, site name, title, description. Blue left border accent. Wired into MessageItem for both compact and full message layouts. useChat's message:updated handler merges linkPreviews from the WS payload so previews appear in real-time without a page reload.
tasks.details: Server: on message create, detect URLs via regex. For each URL, fetch the page (with timeout + size limit), parse og:title, og:description, og:image, og:site_name from meta tags. Store as message.properties.linkPreviews array. Rate-limited (max 3 URLs per message, cache by URL hash for 24h). Client: LinkPreview component below the message content — compact card with image thumbnail, title, description, domain. Click opens the URL. Skip unfurling for [[kind:slug]] embeds. Blocklist for known-bad domains.

tasks.title: Pinned messages
tasks.resolution: Generic pins table (contextId + targetId + targetType) extensible to wiki pages and embeds. Routes: GET /channels/:channelId/pins, POST/DELETE /channels/:channelId/messages/:messageId/pin. Permission-gated (MANAGE_MESSAGES). WS broadcast pin:add/pin:remove. Client: pin/unpin buttons in message actions (📌 Pin / 📌 Unpin), pinnedIds state in ChatView loaded on channel change, threaded through MessageList → MessageItem. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details: Schema: pins table (channelId, messageId, pinnedBy, pinnedAt) or add pinned_at + pinned_by columns to the objects table. Routes: POST /channels/:channelId/messages/:messageId/pin, DELETE to unpin, GET /channels/:channelId/pins returns pinned messages. Permission: MANAGE_MESSAGES. Client: pin/unpin in message context menu, 'Pinned' button in channel header opens a ScrollListView. WS broadcast pin:add / pin:remove for real-time. Federate as AS2 Add/Remove activities.

tasks.title: User bans
tasks.resolution: Schema: server_bans table (serverId, userId, bannedBy, reason, expiresAt for temp bans). Routes: POST /servers/:serverId/ban (with optional durationHours), DELETE /servers/:serverId/ban/:userId to unban, GET /servers/:serverId/bans to list. Join endpoint checks ban list — expired bans auto-cleaned on join attempt. Permission: owner/admin only. Owner can't be banned. Audit-logged (member.ban, member.unban). WS broadcast member:banned. Ban also removes server membership. Client: banUser, unbanUser, getBans API functions. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details: Schema: server_bans table (id, serverId, userId, bannedBy, reason, bannedAt, expiresAt nullable for permanent). Routes: POST /servers/:serverId/ban { userId, reason?, duration? }, DELETE /servers/:serverId/ban/:userId to unban, GET /servers/:serverId/bans to list. Join endpoint checks ban list. New BAN_MEMBERS permission. Client: ban button in member list (for admins), ban management in server settings. Audit-logged. WS broadcast member:banned so other clients update.

tasks.title: User profile cards
tasks.resolution: Server: GET /users/:userId/profile returns public profile (avatar, displayName, username, bio, createdAt, mutual servers with the requesting user). Client: ProfileCard component rendered as a fixed popover when clicking an author name in messages. Shows avatar (or colored initial), display name, handle, bio, member-since date, mutual servers (chips), and Send Message button. Click outside or Escape to close. Positioned relative to the clicked element. CSS dark card with shadow. 3 i18n strings. 274 tests + build pass.
tasks.details: Server: GET /users/:userId/profile returns public profile (avatar, displayName, username, bio, createdAt, mutual servers with the requesting user, roles in the current server). Client: ProfileCard component rendered as a popover when clicking a username/avatar in messages or member list. Shows avatar, name, bio, role badges, member-since date. Action buttons: Send DM, Add Friend, Kick/Ban (admin-only). Reuse the ProfilePanel's AvatarDisplay component.

deferred.title: P2 features: code highlighting, advanced search, DND, message jump, accessibility
deferred.reason: Important for polish but not blocking launch. Tackle after the P1 gaps are closed.
